ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (e.g., International investment position) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., survey, API) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the series belongs to */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., IIP-Reserve assets-Net assets-Monet gold-Stocks-Qtly-M€) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "functional_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the functional category the series belongs to */,
  "financial_instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the series belongs to */,
  "original_maturity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original maturity the series belongs to */,
  "reference_institutional_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference institutional sector the series belongs to */,
  "reference_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference territory the series belongs to */,
  "counterparty_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty territory the series belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the series belongs to */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the series */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_reference_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_territory_id") REFERENCES reference_territories ("reference_territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_reference_institutional_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_institutional_sector_id") REFERENCES reference_institutional_sectors ("reference_institutional_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_counterparty_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_territory_id") REFERENCES counterparty_territories ("counterparty_territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_original_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_maturity_id") REFERENCES original_maturities ("original_maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_functional_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("functional_category_id") REFERENCES functional_categories ("functional_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_financial_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("financial_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_categories" (
  "functional_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional category */,
  "functional_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional category (e.g., Reserve assets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the functional category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the functional category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "financial_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "financial_instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Monetary gold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_maturities" (
  "original_maturity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each original maturity */,
  "original_maturity_name" TEXT /* Name of the original maturity (e.g., None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the original maturity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the original maturity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the original maturity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("original_maturity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_institutional_sectors" (
  "reference_institutional_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference institutional sector */,
  "reference_institutional_sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference institutional sector (e.g., Total Economy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference institutional sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reference institutional sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reference institutional sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_institutional_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_territories" (
  "reference_territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference territory */,
  "reference_territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference territory (e.g., Portugal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference territory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reference territory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reference territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counterparty_territories" (
  "counterparty_territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty territory */,
  "counterparty_territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty territory (e.g., All countries) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the counterparty territory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the counterparty territory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the counterparty territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Net assets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the data point belongs to */,
  "periodicity" TEXT /* Periodicity of the data (e.g., Quarterly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Banco de Portugal) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the data (e.g., Millions of euros) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Actual value of the data point */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data period */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., financial analyst, economist, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
